task: Parse the contract PDF, let the LLM preplanner define schema and recovery policy, use online API first, and automatically fallback to local CLI when page provenance is missing.
plan: Inspect input type and task objective
Parse document with MinerU or native HTML extractor
Normalize content blocks with page-level or document-level provenance
Build markdown, section, key-value, table, and numeric views
Run quality checks and produce traceable logs
Prioritize section hierarchy and clause-like paragraph extraction
Preserve source page or document heading evidence for each clause
LLM preplan: Use online Agent API as the first low-cost parser.
LLM preplan: Validate page-level provenance before accepting the result.
LLM preplan: Fallback to local MinerU CLI if page provenance is missing.
LLM preplan: Build structured JSON, retrieval chunks, and trace evidence.

sections.title: Data Processing Service Agreement
sections.text:
Contract No: STD-2026-MINERU-07

Effective Date: 2026-05-20

Parties: Corpus Producer A and Processing Vendor B

sections.title: 1. Scope
sections.text: The vendor provides a traceable document parsing agent for PDF, scanned files, web pages, and structured exports.

sections.title: 2. Compliance Clauses
sections.text:
ClauseRequirementEvidence Field
2.1Supplier must keep trace logs for every parsing run.trace_path
2.2Output JSON must include structured sections and tables.result.json
3.1Failures must be recoverable without stopping the batch.batch_report.json
4.1Keys and tokens must not be written to public artifacts.secret_scan

sections.title: 3. Service Level
sections.text: Batch tasks must continue after a single item failure and must record the error message.

sections.title: 4. Exception Handling
sections.text:
Risk: missing page provenance must be reported as a quality issue instead of being hidden.

Recommendation: the reviewer should inspect trace.json and retrieval\_quality.json.

sections.title: 5. Signature
sections.text: Signed by: Data Governance Office / Vendor Engineering Lead

extracted.markdown_preview:
# Data Processing Service Agreement Contract No: STD-2026-MINERU-07 Effective Date: 2026-05-20 Parties: Corpus Producer A and Processing Vendor B ## 1. Scope The vendor provides a traceable document parsing agent for PDF, scanned files, web pages, and structured exports. ## 2. Compliance Clauses
ClauseRequirementEvidence Field
2.1Supplier must keep trace logs for every parsing run.trace_path
2.2Output JSON must include structured sections and tables.result.json
3.1Failures must be recoverable without stopping the batch.batch_report.json
4.1Keys and tokens must not be written to public artifacts.secret_scan
## 3. Service Level Batch tasks must continue after a single item failure and must record the error message. ## 4. Exception Handling Risk: missing page provenance must be reported as a quality issue instead of being hidden. Recommendation: the reviewer should inspect trace.json and retrieval\_quality.json. ## 5. Signature Signed by: Data Governance Office / Vendor Engineering Lead

actions: Initial quality issues were preserved for audit: no_page_provenance.

pre_execution_plan.task_understanding: Contract PDF requires structured clause/table extraction and page-level auditability.
execution_plan: Use online Agent API as the first low-cost parser.
Validate page-level provenance before accepting the result.
Fallback to local MinerU CLI if page provenance is missing.
Build structured JSON, retrieval chunks, and trace evidence.
recovery_policy: If no_page_provenance appears after online API parsing, fallback to local CLI artifacts.
pre_execution_plan.boundary: offline deterministic scheduler; set DEEPSEEK_API_KEY or MODELSCOPE_API_KEY for live LLM.

execution_plan: Review selected attempt and retrieval chunks.

risk_findings.message: Live external LLM was not used in this environment.

recovery_suggestions: Re-run with live ModelScope or DeepSeek key before final live-demo submission.
